title: Metallic Bone prevents damage to equipped creature

card.rawText: The equipped creature cannot receive damage. During your opponent's turn they may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-3, this card is destroyed.

plan.title: Metallic Bone prevents damage to equipped creature
plan.summary: Attach Metallic Bone and verify the equipped creature receives damage immunity.

notes: Pre-place this equip Magic on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
Use the card rules text for expected behavior.

steps: Put Metallic Bone in player_1 magic slot.
Attach it to player_1 primary creature.
Verify equipped primary cannot receive damage.

expectedAssertions.label: Metallic Bone status route emitted evidence
Equipped primary has damage immunity status
